title: $ $-Fine Partition
statement: Let $[a,b]$ be a closed interval, let $\delta:[a,b]\to(0,\infty)$ be a gauge, and let $\dot{\mathcal{P}}=\{([x_{i-1},x_i],t_i)\}_{i=1}^n$ be a tagged partition of $[a,b]$. The tagged partition $\dot{\mathcal{P}}$ is $\delta$-fine if and only if for every $i \in \{1,\dots,n\}$ and every $x \in [x_{i-1},x_i]$ the inequality $|x-t_i|<\delta(t_i)$ holds.
